title: Monsoon Moist Italian Shrimp Ossobuco
description: A Ligurian-inspired dish featuring jumbo shrimp in a rich and silky sauce, served in the style of ossobuco. This diabetic-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the jumbo shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the pot and set aside.
Add the white wine, lemon juice, chicken broth, thyme, bay leaves, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Return the shrimp to the pot and simmer for an additional 2 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve the shrimp in the style of ossobuco, with the sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
